query: SELECT ss.id, ss.item_key, ss.display_name, ic.category AS catalog_category, ec.equip_id, ec.slot AS equip_slot FROM game_spirit_shop ss LEFT JOIN game_item_catalog ic ON ss.item_key = ic.item_id LEFT JOIN game_equipment_catalog ec ON ss.item_key = ec.equip_id WHERE ss.item_key = 'iron_sword' LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PS8xt1zjvuRpYHF.3bd331015af6 --database MLF7bLVZzzxdGTPVXTct3c --execute SELECT ss.id, ss.item_key, ss.display_name, ic.category AS catalog_category, ec.equip_id, ec.slot AS equip_slot FROM game_spirit_shop ss LEFT JOIN game_item_catalog ic ON ss.item_key = ic.item_id LEFT JOIN game_equipment_catalog ec ON ss.item_key = ec.equip_id WHERE ss.item_key = 'iron_sword' LIMIT 5;
